hero.title: Stolen data hits the Dark Web.
hero.description: Whiteintel monitors malware infections, hacker forums, and Telegram channels for the brands you protect. Real-time intelligence on leaked credentials and lookalike domains, with managed takedowns of the infrastructure impersonating you.
hero.tagline: See what the dark web already knows about your organization.
hero.searchHint: Domain or work email · results in seconds · no signup needed
hero.storyProblemTitle: Stolen credentials are the entry point
hero.storyProblemBody: Infostealer malware quietly harvests employee and customer logins, and they surface on hacker forums and Telegram within hours. Most teams never see it happen.
hero.storySolutionBody: Whiteintel monitors hacker forums, dark web marketplaces, Telegram channels, and stealer logs in real time, surfacing brand mentions and leaked credentials as they appear. Reset accounts, revoke sessions, and take down impersonating infrastructure before stolen access becomes a breach.

search.title: Check your Dark Web Exposure
search.subtitle: Enter a domain or email to detect your leak exposure in seconds
search.errorDomain: Please enter a domain or email.

features.title: Every exposure channel.
features.description: Eight detection modules cover everything from stolen credentials to fraudulent domains and exposed code. Each alert ties the finding to the asset it affects, so your team acts on signal, not noise.

items.title: Credential Leak Monitoring
items.description: Real-time tracking of plaintext credentials across hacker forum shares and private logs.

items.title: Infostealer Intelligence
items.description: Direct exfiltration from C2 servers, pinpointing infected devices and organizational exposure.

items.title: Dark Web Mention Monitoring
items.description: Automated scanning of onion sites, marketplaces, and Telegram channels for brand mentions.

items.title: Look-alike Domain Detection
items.description: Proactive alerting on typosquatting and malicious infrastructure targeting your brand.

items.title: GitHub Secret Scanning
items.description: Identify exposed API keys, private tokens, and internal code snippets in public repositories.

items.title: Continuous Threat News
items.description: Aggregated, AI-summarized intelligence from underground forums and public security feeds.

items.title: Supplier Security
items.description: Continuous exposure monitoring for your vendors with a 0-100 supply-chain risk score per supplier.

items.title: Payment Fraud Intelligence
items.description: Real-time stolen-card and BIN monitoring against the WhiteIntel exposed-card index.

howItWorks.title: How Whiteintel
howItWorks.description: We continuously ingest and analyze millions of raw data points from the dark web, filtering out the noise to deliver a high-fidelity intelligence pipeline.

steps.title: Detect
steps.description: Dark web intelligence collected by Whiteintel Sensors across Telegram, Hacker Forums, Dark Web Resources and Stealer Logs.

steps.title: Prioritize
steps.description: Our AI engine correlates big data and generates searchable and actionable threat intelligence.

steps.title: Remediate
steps.description: Neutralize stolen accounts via automated API triggers before unauthorized access occurs.

teams.title: Empowering Global
teams.description: Whiteintel integrates seamlessly into professional security ecosystems, providing the precision required for mission-critical decision making.
